title: Thiruppumunai
desc: Catherine and Aishwarya, co-passengers on a plane journey, become friends and share their love stories. Catherine is shocked when she learns that the man she is dating resembles Aishwarya's fiance.

title: Vazhakku Enn 18/9
desc: A poor Venu works at a roadside shop and loves Jyothi, who is employed in the adjoining apartment. Before Venu gets a chance to express his love to her, she meets with an accident and he is arrested.

title: Kalyana Vaibhogam - Srinivasa Kalayanam
desc: An innocent girl marries into a wealthy but cursed family, initially happy. However, her life takes a dark turn when an evil lookalike replaces her to carry out sinister plans.

title: Adipurush
desc: Prince Raghava is exiled. Demon king Lankesh, seeking salvation, kidnaps Raghava's wife, Janaki, for revenge. Raghava seeks help, finds allies, and prepares to confront Lankesh in Lanka.

title: Naalu Policeum Nalla Irundha Oorum
desc: Four policemen lead a happy and peaceful life in a village known for its virtuousness. However, everything changes after they receive a job transfer letter to another village known for its riots.

title: Vaangga Mappaley Vaanga
desc: A city boy falls for a village belle but realizes that winning her heart involves more than just love, presenting him with new challenges.

title: Sabash Gowtham
desc: The grandson of a wealthy businessman is set to reconcile with his estranged daughter, Sunanda, who was previously disowned for marrying Rajasekhar.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: Compilation of catchy Tamil songs by notable artists from various movies.

title: Ithu Enga Area
desc: Hari and Karthika fall in love with each other but are distraught when they find they are from different castes. However, they decide to fight for their relationship and parents' approval.
